The method is not invoked anywhere within the extension itself and therefore poses no direct risk in a default installation. However, custom extensions that call this method with untrusted input would expose the site to SQL injection. This has been patched in version 8.1.2, 9.1.1, and 10.0.1.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00327, "percentile": 0.24575}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-3h52-6v6j-6wwv", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-29T17:40:13Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3h52-6v6j-6wwv", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-3h52-6v6j-6wwv"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-8827"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T10:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T12:31:39Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-8827", "https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-ext-sa-2026-012", "https://github.com/FriendsOfPHP/security-advisories/blob/master/friendsoftypo3/tt-address/CVE-2026-8827.yaml", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-3h52-6v6j-6wwv"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/FriendsOfTYPO3/tt_address", "summary": "TYPO3 SQL Injection in extension \"Address List\" (tt_address)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-29T17:40:14Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-3h52-6v6j-6wwv", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "10.0.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "friendsoftypo3/tt-address"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 10.0.0, < 10.0.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "9.1.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "friendsoftypo3/tt-address"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 9.0.0, < 9.1.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "8.1.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "friendsoftypo3/tt-address"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 8.1.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}
